title: FAOSTAT Trade — Crops and Livestock Products (export/import quantity+value by commodity)
retrieved_by: agent:iran-specialty-goods-hunt (download) + claude (filtering/cleanup after the agent hit a usage-limit wall mid-task)
notes: The original bulk file (Trade_CropsLivestock_E_All_Data_(Normalized).csv) was 2.4GB, well over this project's 500MB cap. Stream-filtered to our 17-country set (filtered_iran_and_comparators.csv, 1,571,697 rows, 172MB) and the oversized original was deleted -- the 265MB zip is kept as the re-derivable archival source. A second filter file the downloading agent had started (filtered_all_items.csv) was found malformed (broken CSV parsing, included countries/items outside any sensible filter criterion) and was discarded rather than kept as-is. This dataset gives export/ import quantity AND value by specific commodity -- e.g. Iran's pistachio import quantity by year -- filling the 'export value, not just production volume' gap noted in DATA_INVENTORY.md for pistachio/specialty crops.

failures.issue: downloading agent hit a session usage-limit wall mid-task, left the 2.4GB unfiltered file and a malformed partial filter on disk
failures.resolution: cleaned up by claude in the main thread; see notes above
